zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk於1048年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特時，他的父親Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee13歲，母親Joan de Saint Sauver18歲。他於大約1080年與Adelise de Tosny結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1107年住在英國素福爾可福拉苗林加姆 卡素。他於1066年登記服兵役。他於1074年在英國被列為sheriff norfolk and suffolk。他去世於1107年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可特福德享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk于1048年出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特时，他的父亲Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee13岁，母亲Joan de Saint Sauver18岁。他于大约1080年与Adelise de Tosny结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1107年住在英国素福爾可福拉苗林加姆 卡素。他于1066年登记服兵役。他于1074年在英国被列为sheriff norfolk and suffolk。他去世于1107年9月9日在英国英格兰諾福爾可特福德享年59岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可特福德特福德 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk was born in 1048, in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, his father, Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee, was 13 and his mother, Joan de Saint Sauver, was 18. He married Adelise de Tosny about 1080. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England in 1107. He registered for military service in 1066. In 1074, at the age of 26, his occupation is listed as sheriff norfolk and suffolk in England. He died on 9 September 1107, in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk est né en 1048, à Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Joan de Saint Sauver, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Adelise de Tosny environ 1080. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Angleterre en 1107. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. En 1074, à l’âge de 26 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff norfolk and suffolk à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1107, à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk 1048 in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee 13 und seine Mutter Joan de Saint Sauver 18. Er hat um 1080 Adelise de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1107 hat er in Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England gelebt. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1074, als er 26 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff norfolk and suffolk in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. September 1107 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Thetford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk è nato il nel 1048 nel Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Saint Sauver, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Adelise de Tosny circa 1080. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England nel 1107. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Nel 1074, all'età di 26 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff norfolk and suffolk nel England. Morì il 9 settembre 1107, nel Thetford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkが1048年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウル-レ-ヴィコムトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Bigod de Burghersheeは13歳，母Joan de Saint Sauverは18歳であった。約1080年にAdelise de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1107年にはイギリススフォルクフラムリンガム カストルに住んでいた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。1074年，26歳の時，イギリスでの職業はsheriff norfolk and suffolkと記録されている。彼は1107年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードで59歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードスエトフォード プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(이)가 1048년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우-레-빅트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Saint Sauver(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1080년 Adelise de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1107년도에 영국 수폴크 프램링함 카스틀에서 살았다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1074년, 26세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 sheriff norfolk and suffolk이었다. 그는 1107년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 테트퍼드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드 테트퍼드 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk nasceu em 1048, em Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Saint Sauver, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelise de Tosny aproximadamente 1080. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra em 1107. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Em 1074, com 26 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff norfolk and suffolk em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1107, em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk родился в 1048 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-ле-викомт, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Saint Sauver, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelise de Tosny около 1080 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности фрамлингхам кастл, суффолк, Англия в 1107 году. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1074 году, в возрасте 26 лет, работал по профессии sheriff norfolk and suffolk в местности Англия. Он умер 9 сентября 1107 г. в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности тетфорд приори, тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

sm.from 1101 to 1307: mai le 1107 e o'o I le 1307

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk nació en 1048, en Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Joan de Saint Sauver, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Adelise de Tosny aproximadamente 1080. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Inglaterra en 1107. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. En 1074, a la edad de 26 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff norfolk and suffolk en Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1107, en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford Priory, Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
